mapper.select: SELECT t.* FROM tb_psm_wo t WHERE t.deleted = 0 ORDER BY t.created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_psm_wo WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT t.* FROM tb_psm_wo t WHERE t.id = #{id} AND t.deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_psm_wo WHERE wo_no LIKE #{prefix} + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_psm_wo ( wo_no, wo_type, priority, functional_location, equipment_no, equipment_name, plant_code, work_center, plan_start_date, plan_end_date, actual_start_date, actual_end_date, manager_name, description, status, labor_cost, material_cost, outsourcing_cost, other_cost, operations_json, materials_json, created_by, modified_by, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{woNo}, #{woType}, #{priority}, #{functionalLocation}, #{equipmentNo}, #{equipmentName}, #{plantCode}, #{workCenter}, #{planStartDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{planEndDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{actualStartDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{actualEndDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{managerName}, #{description}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'CREATED'), #{laborCost}, #{materialCost}, #{outsourcingCost}, #{otherCost}, #{operationsJson}, #{materialsJson}, #{createdBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, #{modifiedBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_psm_wo SET wo_type = #{woType}, priority = #{priority}, functional_location = #{functionalLocation}, equipment_no = #{equipmentNo}, equipment_name = #{equipmentName}, plant_code = #{plantCode}, work_center = #{workCenter}, plan_start_date = #{planStartDate,jdbcType=DATE}, plan_end_date = #{planEndDate,jdbcType=DATE}, actual_start_date = #{actualStartDate,jdbcType=DATE}, actual_end_date = #{actualEndDate,jdbcType=DATE}, manager_name = #{managerName}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, labor_cost = #{laborCost}, material_cost = #{materialCost}, outsourcing_cost = #{outsourcingCost}, other_cost = #{otherCost}, operations_json = #{operationsJson}, materials_json = #{materialsJson}, modified_by = #{modifiedBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_psm_wo SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
